name: Amulet of Ambition
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>下</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>げ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>克</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>上</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>首</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>くび</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>飾</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かざ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>り
desc: Equip only to a Normal Monster. If it battles a monster with a higher Level, the equipped monster gains 500 ATK x the difference in Levels, during that damage calculation only. When this card is sent to the GY: You can place it on top of your Deck.
eff: Equip only to a Normal Monster. If it battles a monster with a higher Level, the equipped monster gains 500 ATK x the difference in Levels, during that damage calculation only. When this card is sent to the GY: You can place it on top of your Deck.

sets.set: Speed Duel Starter Decks: Ultimate Predators

action: Places itself from the player's Graveyard on the top of the Deck
misc: Equips only to a specific target
